_meta.schema: core.schemas.Estimate (with line_items=list[CostLine] populated from takeoff items pre-pricing)
_meta.note_on_shape: This file uses the CostLine shape pre-populated with quantity=null/unit=TBD as a skeleton. After F1 (CWICR) lands and quantities are filled in from drawings, the estimator can price this directly via core.estimator.price_takeoff (after coercing the null quantities to floats).
_meta.location: Harrington Education Center Office Tower, Bldg 0435, College Station, TX 77843
_meta.region_multiplier_note: Brazos County / TAMU College Station typically clears at ~0.93-0.96 of national RSMeans City Cost Index. Carry 1.0 until confirmed with current RSMeans CCI lookup for College Station 77843.
_meta.contingency_pct_note: Reduced from default 10% to 7% for a single-room reno; bump back to 10% if drawings prove thin.
_meta.profit_pct_note: Institutional state-work norm. Drop to 5% if HSP plan is shaky and we want maximum price competitiveness.
_meta.assumed_room_area_basis: Single college science classroom/lab in a TAMU office tower; verify against drawings (could be as low as 800 SF or as high as 1,500 SF).
_meta.fill_instructions: Each item below has quantity=null and unit set per the cost-DB convention. When drawings arrive: (1) replace quantity with the measured number, (2) verify unit matches the cost-DB unit (mismatches will be suppressed per CALIBRATION_REPORT v3 fix C), (3) update source_sheet_ids with the drawing sheet that backs the takeoff, (4) re-run core.estimator.price_takeoff or hand-price each line.

line_items.description: General conditions / project supervision
line_items.notes: [TBD] Set quantity to the project duration in months (typical 2–3 mo for a single-room reno).

line_items.description: Temporary facilities and controls (dumpster, dust containment, walk-off mats, portable toilet)
line_items.notes: [TBD] 1 LS. Carry $6,500 seed; bump if TAMU dictates remote dumpster placement requiring extra haul.

line_items.description: Selective interior demolition (existing classroom/lab finishes, casework, ceiling, flooring)
line_items.notes: [TBD ~1,200 SF] Measure the room area from the demo plan. Includes finishes, casework, and ceiling tile only; structural and exterior-shell demo is not in scope.

line_items.description: Hazmat abatement (lead, asbestos, PCBs) — allowance pending TAMU EHS survey
line_items.notes: [TBD: 0 or allowance $0-$8K] Drop to zero if TAMU EHS survey clears the room. Carry as a documented assumption otherwise.

line_items.description: Lab-grade casework — base + wall cabinets with phenolic/epoxy resin work top
line_items.notes: [TBD] Seed DB $425/LF is light for lab-grade casework; real number is $600–$900/LF. Verify against drawings and casework schedule.

line_items.description: Wall blocking for shelving, monitor mounts, ADA grab — allowance
line_items.notes: [TBD] Small allowance — likely <100 SF of blocking total. Note seed unit is SF; if drawings call out per-mount EA, convert before pricing.

line_items.description: Solid-core wood classroom door — replace if scope
line_items.notes: [TBD 0–2 EA] Existing may stay; confirm against door schedule.

line_items.description: Door hardware — institutional ADA lever, ANSI Grade 1
line_items.notes: [TBD: match door qty] Pair with each new door.

line_items.description: Metal-stud framing for new / furred partitions
line_items.notes: [TBD: SF of partition face area] Likely zero if floor plan stays; non-zero if any new partition added.

line_items.description: 5/8" Type-X GWB on framing (both faces)
line_items.notes: [TBD: SF of GWB, both faces if both sides finished] Quantity = 2 × partition LF × height for both faces of any new partition.

line_items.description: Acoustical ceiling tile — 2x4 lay-in grid + tile
line_items.notes: [TBD ~1,200 SF] Full room replacement assumed; verify against reflected ceiling plan.

line_items.description: Vinyl plank flooring (LVT) — classroom zone
line_items.notes: [TBD] Split room area between classroom (LVT) and lab (sheet vinyl) zones per finish plan.

line_items.description: Sheet vinyl with heat-welded seams — wet lab zone (chemical-resistant)
line_items.notes: [TBD] No cost-DB hit. Carry $10–$14/SF allowance. May not apply if no wet-lab zone.

line_items.description: Resilient base — 4" rubber, integral or cove
line_items.notes: [TBD: LF of room perimeter + any casework toe-kick] Roughly room perimeter ~140 LF for a 30'x40' room.

line_items.description: Interior painting — walls + soffits + door frames (2-coat institutional latex, low-VOC)
line_items.notes: [TBD: SF of paint surface] Quantity = wall LF × ceiling height + soffit SF + door-frame allowance.

line_items.description: Room signage — ADA-compliant interior identification
line_items.notes: [TBD 1–2 EA] 'Lab 303' room sign + ADA tactile sign per TAMU wayfinding standard.

line_items.description: Tackable wall panels, marker board, AV mounting board
line_items.notes: [TBD] No cost-DB hit. Carry small allowance.

line_items.description: Owner-furnished lab equipment — coordination only (no GC cost)
line_items.notes: [TBD] Coordination only; GC roughs in utilities. Carry coordination time in GCs.

line_items.description: Sprinkler-head relocation per new ceiling layout
line_items.notes: [TBD 4–10 EA] Seed DB is per SF; carry $250–$450/EA allowance for per-head pricing on a single-room mod. EHS shutdown windows required.

line_items.description: Lab sink + faucet + gooseneck spout (incl. rough-in)
line_items.notes: [TBD 1–4 EA] Lab fixture trims run $2,500–$3,500/EA installed — seed of $1,850 is light.

line_items.description: Eye-wash + safety-shower combo (plumbed)
line_items.notes: [TBD 0–1 EA] No cost-DB hit. Carry $3,500–$5,500/EA installed allowance.

line_items.description: DI water tap (if program requires)
line_items.notes: [TBD] Confirm against MEP drawings + program.

line_items.description: Lab gas / vacuum / compressed-air piping (if program requires)
line_items.notes: [TBD] Confirm against MEP drawings + program.

line_items.description: HVAC modifications — diffuser/grille relocation, VAV retrim
line_items.notes: [TBD ~1,200 SF served] Seed DB $22.50/SF is for ground-up RTU+duct; a single-room retrim is more like $8–$15/SF. Adjust unit_cost down at pricing time.

line_items.description: Test, adjust, balance (TAB) report
line_items.notes: [TBD 1 LS] Typical TAMU SGC requirement; $2,500–$5,000 range.

line_items.description: Lighting — LED fixture replacement
line_items.notes: [TBD: count from RCP] Typical 1 fixture per 75 SF → ~16 fixtures for 1,200 SF.

line_items.description: Branch wiring + devices (receptacles, switches, controls)
line_items.notes: [TBD ~1,200 SF] Includes dedicated 20A circuits at lab benches, GFCI within 6' of sinks, classroom occupancy / daylight / dimming controls.

line_items.description: Sub-panel for lab loads (if heavy equipment)
line_items.notes: [TBD 0–1 EA] Carry $4,500–$7,000/EA for a real lab sub-panel; seed DB 26 24 16 ($2,400) is residential-spec.

line_items.description: Low-voltage pathway — data, AV (conduit, J-boxes, ring & string)
line_items.notes: [TBD: # outlets] TAMU Tech Services furnishes cable + termination; GC scope = pathway only.

line_items.description: Fire-alarm device relocation (strobe, smoke detector)
line_items.notes: [TBD] Coordinate shutdown with TAMU EHS; per-device install ~$350–$650.

_unsuppressed_summary.note: Subtotal / contingency / overhead / profit / grand_total all currently $0 because every line is at quantity=null and unit_cost=0. Once quantities are filled and the cost-DB lookup runs, the model_dump shape will match exports/calibration_v3/estimate.json.
